summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mission Control dashboard with AgentMail integration - all backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend: All 21 API endpoints including 4 new AgentMail endpoints (inboxes, messages, threads, stats)
Backend: AgentMail integration returns 5 real inboxes with correct brand mapping
Backend: Real messages from support@agentictrust.app (20 messages)
Backend: Full thread data with 4 messages (thread_id: e3afe16d-a5de-4952-99f9-49c1e791c5d8)
Backend: Brand filtering works (1 agentic-trust inbox when filtered)
Backend: Stats endpoint returns real pending_emails count (99) from AgentMail
Frontend: Inboxes view shows 5 real AgentMail inboxes with display names, email addresses, message counts
Frontend: Clicking inbox opens message list with subjects, senders, previews, timestamps
Frontend: Clicking message opens thread viewer with expandable messages
Frontend: Back button navigation works (thread → messages → inbox list)
Frontend: Overview page shows real AgentMail data (99 pending emails)
Frontend: Brand filtering works (Agentic Trust shows only 1 inbox)
Frontend: All previous features still work (approvals, agents, tasks, activity navigation)
Integration: Frontend-backend AgentMail API communication working perfectly
Integration: Real-time AgentMail data display and filtering
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (21/21 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all AgentMail features working)
